title: Build daily drift scan cron at 6am Pacific

log.context: Build daily drift scan cron at 6am Pacific

Everything is working. Here's a summary:

**What was built:**

- `/mnt/data/scripts/drift_scan.py` — the scan script. Checks labs with no commits in 14+ days (tries both the lab's own git history and the parent repo), and GitHub issues with no activity in 14+ days. Prints a formatted Discord message if anything stale is found; silent if clean.

- `/mnt/data/temporal-workflows/activities/drift_scan_act.py` — Temporal activity that runs the script and posts output to Discord via the inject endpoin...(truncated)
